title: Blewming
description: Blewming is an atmospheric game that focuses on cozy interactions, blowing away flower petals in a cute valley.
reflection:
This was a project I did with an artist. I spent a lot of time applying the vector math I learned in the previous semester and really enjoyed fiddling with equations. My approach also got a lot cleaner. Even as the only programmer again, I would say my product got better and better.

I was essentially the planner and director and, while I was capable in that department, I did notice that I prefer being in my little programming and thinking bubble.
